title: cassida minor
intro: Cassida minor, also known as the lesser nettle or field nettle, is a type of perennial plant in the nettle family. The medicinal properties of Cassida minor include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Cassida minor include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and allergies. Cassida minor can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
